titleStmt.title: SII 11.113: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 113. (B.K. No. 45 of 1928-29). HUNGUND, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE CELLING OF THE MIDDLE HALL OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALIṄGA.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva (Sōmēśvara II) and records a grant of land made to Ārya-Paṇḍita, the disciple of Aruhaṇandi-Bhaṭṭāraka, of the Sūrasta-gaṇa and the Chitrakūṭ-ānvaya, for the benefit of the Arasara-basadi, at Ponnugunda, the rājadhānī of the (Ponnugunda)-Thirty division, by the chiefs, Śrīkaraṇa Dēvaṇayya-Nāyaka, Pergaḍe Nākimayya who was the chief officer of the state, Pergaḍe Rēvaṇayya, the Karaṇa Āychapayya-Nāyaka and Pasāyita (General) Kāṭimayya, on the occasion of the Jina-pūjā conducted by all the Pradhānas. Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara LakshmarasaSee Bombay Gazetteer, Vol. I, Pt. p. 443., who bore the epithet ‘Saṅgrāma-Garuḍa’ was then ruling over Beḷvala Three Hundred and Puligeṟe Three Hundred.
The record is dated Śaka 996, Ānanda, Pushya, śu. pañchamī, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, which corresponds to A.D. 1074, December 24.See Ep. Rep. 1928-29, p. III.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasvādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ [.] jīyāt traiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttumire © tatpāda
padmōpajīvi © samadhigasa paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara nudāramahē
śvaraṁ calakkebalgaṇḍaṁ śauryyamārttaṇḍaṁ patiḷōkapāḷaṁ saṁgrāmagaruḍaṁ manujamāndhā
taṁ kīrttivikhyātaṁ gōtramāṇikyaṁ vivēkacāṇikyaṁ paranārīsahōdaraṁ vīravṛkōdaraṁ kōdaṇḍa
pārtthaṁ saujanyatīrtthaṁ maṇḍaḷikakaṇṭhīravaṁ paracakrabhairavaṁ rāyadaṇḍagōpāḷaṁ male
ya maṇḍaḷikavṛgaśārddoḷaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēva pādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ śrīma
nmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ lakṣmarasarbbeḷvala mūnūṟumaṁ puligeṟe mūnūṟumaṁ
duṣṭanigrahaviṣiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta
mire © śrīramaṇīsa maṇḍaḷikamaṇḍana maṇḍaḷika pracaṇḍakhaṇṭhīrava(ṁ) duṣṭamaṇḍaḷika bhairava(ṁ)ma
ṇḍaḷikatriṇīśra durvvāratarapratāpa subhalakṣaṇa lakṣmaṇamaṇḍaḷīka vi
stāritacārukīrtti ninagārddore mattina maṇḍaḷēśvararu © dharepārāvāramēḷuṁ gi
rigaḷivana biṇpiṁge gu(ṁ)ṇpiṁge peṁpiṁgare kā yuṁ bhāraviga negaṇa mā
na sākkrāntiyaṁ māḍi kali durbbādharaṁ baṇnisadira mahīpāḷaugha mattettakārjñā
kara sattāḷirdda cakēśvarana kaṭakadoḷu samastavisa yā
dikārasāra saṁpannaṁ bhabyajanaprasannaṁ bhavagadarhatparamēśvara pūjāviśuddhanuṁ maṁtra
nidhānanu menisida śrīkaraṇada dēvaṇayya nāyakanuṁ samastarājyabharani
rūpitanumappa perggaḍe nākimayyanuṁ jinasamayasamuccaḷitadivyagandhabandhura
gandhōdakapavitrīkṛtōttamāṁganu menisida perggaḍe rēvaṇayyanuṁ sucaritrapātranu
menisida karaṇada Āycapayyanāyakanuṁ jinadharmmanirmmaḷa nenisida pasāyi
taṁ kāṭimayyanuṁ Intu samastapradhānara binnahadiṁ sakavarṣa 996 neya Ānanda saṁvata
rada puṣya suddha paṁcami Ādityavāra muttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti tithinimittadiṁ mūvattara mo
dala bāḍaṁ rājadhāni ponnuṁguṁdada vūra naḍuvaṇa Arasarabasadige mūlasaṁghada sūra
stagaṇada śrī citrakūṭānvayada kanakanaṁdibhaṭṭārakaravara śiṣyaruttarāsaṁgabhaṭṭāraka ravara
śiṣyaru bhāskaranaṁdipaṇḍitadēvaravara sādharmmigaḷāda paravādi sūryāmaharśrī naṁdi bhaṭṭāra
ravara sādharmmiga ḷaruhaṇaṁdibhaṭṭāraka ravara śiṣyarā[da Ā]ryyapaṁḍitargge tale veṭṭa vo
ḷagaṇa sthaḷada mattaru mūvattu māraperggaḍe teṁkanā kovaragāvuṇḍana hāḍakavoḷage
mattaru mūvattuṁ Anteraḍuṁ taḷadaṟuvattu mattaru keyuma nūṟirppa dimmahā
nadoḷ sarvvabādhaparihāramāgi kālaṁ karcci biṭṭu koṭṭaru [.] sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kā
ḷēkāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacandraḥ . © svada
ttāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . rpaṣṭivvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāya(ṁ)tē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 11.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
